title: PwD - View Product Overview Section (Header and Gallery) - Functional Test Plan (33 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-79: PwD - View Product Overview Section (Header and Gallery). Validates that the product details page displays product name, tags, rating with star icon and review count, price, stock status, available geographies, description, and CTAs (Contact Vendor, Save, Share). Also validates the image gallery with main image, thumbnails, carousel navigation, counter, badge, and description.

testCases.title: Product Name is Visible on Details Page
steps: Log in and navigate to a product details page.
Verify the product name heading is visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in and on a product details page.
expectedResults: Product name heading is visible.

testCases.title: Product Name is Rendered as H1 Heading
steps: Navigate to a product details page.
Inspect the product name element tag.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Product name is rendered as an H1 heading.

testCases.title: Product Tags are Displayed
steps: Navigate to a product details page.
Look for product tags/badges.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Product tags/badges are displayed.

testCases.title: Product Tags Contain Category Information
steps: Navigate to a product details page.
Read the tag text content.
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: Tags contain category information text.

steps: Navigate to a product details page.

expectedResults: Product name and gallery are visible on mobile.

Verify product name and gallery are visible.
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to tablet (768x1024).
expectedResults: Product name and gallery are visible on tablet.

testCases.title: Images Load Without Noticeable Delay
steps: Navigate to a product details page.

testCases.preconditions: User is on a product details page.
expectedResults: First image loads within acceptable time threshold.

testCases.title: No Horizontal Overflow on Product Overview
steps: Set viewport to mobile.
Navigate to a product details page.
Check body scroll width.
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to mobile.
expectedResults: Body scroll width does not exceed viewport width.
